title: Data for Translation Efficiency Covariation (TEC) Network Analyses
author: Qi, Kangsheng
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
All data used in this study are placed in the  data/  directory of the current codebase. Below is a description of each file. Most datasets are provided directly, while others were obtained from published works, which are cited but not provided here. 
 
  gene_network_data.h5  - Includes filtered TEC and RNA co-expression matrices. Data is sourced from  Liu et al.  
  tissue_TEC/  - The following files are placed within this subdirectory in the current code implementation.
 
  human_brain_TE_rho.rda  - Brain specific TEC matrices 
  human_liver_TE_rho.rda  - Liver specific TEC matrices 
  human_lung_TE_rho.rda  - Lung specific TEC matrices 
 
 
  protein_abundance.csv  - Aggregated protein abundance data for the 11,088 genes analyzed in the study. Data is obtained from  PaxDb . Tissues include adrenal gland, colon, esophagus, heart muscle, liver, lung, pancreas, stomach, testis, brain, kidney, rectum, spleen, and thyroid.  
  rna_tissue_hpa.tsv  - Unfiltered RNA expression data obtained from  Human Protein Atlas . 
  rna_prot_genes.txt  - List of genes with at least one measurement in any of the nine tissues of interest in both RNA expression and protein abundance datasets. 
  tissue_specificity/  - The following files are placed within this subdirectory in the current code implementation. Tissue specificity was determined following the criteria defined by  Human Protein Atlas .  
 
  protein_brain.csv  - Tissue-enriched and tissue-enhanced genes for brain protein abundance 
  protein_liver.csv  - Tissue-enriched and tissue-enhanced genes for liver protein abundance 
  protein_lung.csv  - Tissue-enriched and tissue-enhanced genes for lung protein abundance 
  rna_brain.csv  - Tissue-enriched, group-enriched, and tissue-enhanced genes for brain RNA expression. Obtained from  Human Protein Atlas  
  rna_liver.csv  - Tissue-enriched, group-enriched, and tissue-enhanced genes for liver RNA expression. Obtained from  Human Protein Atlas  
  rna_lung.csv  - Tissue-enriched, group-enriched, and tissue-enhanced genes for lung RNA expression. Obtained from  Human Protein Atlas  
 
 
 
 Code used for this study can be found at  https://github.com/CenikLab/TEC-Network-Analyses .
